title: 'Boring' vs 'weird': How Republicans are trying to define Tim Walz
shortDescription: Harris selected Walz, the governor of Minnesota, as her running mate Tuesday. Trump allies were quick to attack his record.

title: Trump leaves Obamacare off of Agenda47, after bashing it for years
shortDescription: Former president Donald Trump once promised to repeal Obamacare, but he has not made it an official platform point. What to know about his policy.

title: Key races to watch across four state primary elections on Tuesday
shortDescription: Kansas, Michigan, Missouri, and Washington have their state primary elections Tuesday. Here are the congressional races you should be watching.

title: Why Donald Trump praised the Georgia State Election Board
shortDescription: The Georgia State Election Board creates rules for the battleground state's elections, and its Trump-approved majority is trying to make changes.

title: Elon Musk urged to fix AI election misinformation about Harris
shortDescription: Five states urged Musk to correct false claims spread by X's AI chatbot Grok that Kamala Harris missed the ballot deadline in nine states.

title: Donald Trump appeared as guest on Adin Ross's livestream
shortDescription: Ex-President Donald Trump appeared on popular video game streamer Adin Ross's livestream where he was offered a Rolex watch and Cybertruck as gifts.

title: Will Kamala Harris and Donald Trump debate?
shortDescription: As of August 5, it's unclear if former President Donald Trump and Vice President Kamala Harris will debate before Election Day.

title: Supreme Court justice didn't disclose additional flights on GOP donor's jet, senator says
shortDescription: The letter from Sen. Ron Wyden comes amid heightened congressional scrutiny over Supreme Court ethics rules.

title: Which states still need to hold primary elections?
shortDescription: Eighteen states have yet to hold primary elections for their congressional and local offices. Here's when and where.
